name: Chess
author: AGP
description: Standard chess on an 8x8 board, with the full rules: castling (king- and queen-side), en passant, pawn double-step and promotion to Q/R/B/N, check, checkmate and stalemate. Draws by stalemate, the fifty-move rule, threefold repetition, and insufficient material. White (player 0) moves first.
